## Description

Brief description of the changes.

## Type of Change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Breaking change
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Refactoring

## Component(s) Affected

- [ ] `backend/` — Azure Functions / Agent Framework
- [ ] `extension/` — Azure DevOps Extension UI
- [ ] `infra/` — Bicep / Infrastructure
- [ ] `docs/` — Documentation
- [ ] `.github/` — CI/CD

## Testing

- [ ] Backend unit tests pass (`dotnet test`)
- [ ] Extension builds successfully (`npm run build`)
- [ ] Tested in a real Azure DevOps organization (if UI change)
- [ ] New tests added for new functionality

## Checklist

- [ ] My code follows the project's coding conventions
- [ ] I've updated documentation if needed
- [ ] I've added entries to CHANGELOG if applicable
